full_text:
Dou Fu 竇輔
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dou Fu (竇輔)was born in Youfufeng. Grandson of Dou Wu, escaped being executed due to family friends. Dou Fu was affiliated with Liu Biao and the Wei Kingdom. Dou Fu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
